twitter.post: Ever read a headline and wish you could just ask the news a question? Our Deep Dive Mode lets you do exactly that, plus it adds visuals to help make complex stories much clearer. It is a smarter way to stay informed. HEADLINNE.com #News #Learning

linkedin.title: Most news apps just show you what everyone else is reading.
linkedin.body:
It is easy to get caught in a cycle of reading the same headlines as the rest of the world. But your interests are unique. You have specific topics that matter to your work and your life. Why should your news feed look identical to a total stranger's feed?

True personalization is not about creating an echo chamber. It is about respecting your time. It means surfacing the stories that actually inform your decisions rather than just filling up your screen with noise. When technology is used to filter out the irrelevant, it actually helps you see the world more clearly.

We built Headlinne because we believe news should be tailored to the individual. It should be a tool that helps you stay informed on your terms. We want to move away from the one size fits all approach that dominates most media today.
linkedin.cta: If you are tired of scrolling past stories that do not matter to you, come see how we are doing things differently at HEADLINNE.com.

instagram.title: Top 5 Geopolitics Headlines

slides.headline: What's New in Streaming
slides.explanation: Fans of music and classic TV have plenty of new options to check out. The latest releases include new albums and nostalgic favorites.

slides.headline: Iran Holds Funeral for Leader
slides.explanation: Mourners have gathered in Tehran for the funeral procession of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. The event is taking place in Islamic Revolution Square.

slides.headline: Deadly Attacks Strike Kyiv
slides.explanation: Russia launched a series of missile and drone strikes against the Ukrainian capital overnight. Local authorities report that at least three people have died.

slides.headline: Space Debris Found in Australia
slides.explanation: Scientists believe they have identified the origin of mysterious space objects found in Queensland. The Australian Space Agency says they appear to be parts from a launch vehicle.

slides.headline: New Toll in Kyiv Missile Attack
slides.explanation: A separate report indicates that a recent Russian ballistic missile attack on the Kyiv region killed at least eight people. The strikes occurred just before a major Nato summit.

instagram.caption: Stay informed with the latest updates from around the world today. From major international conflicts to surprising discoveries in Australia, we are covering the news that matters. Swipe through for the full breakdown. Read more on HEADLINNE.com.

instagram.title: Top 5 Finance Stories Today

slides.headline: Bubble tea brand loses legal battle
slides.explanation: A Chinese court ordered Molly Tea to pay Louis Vuitton 1.5 million dollars. The court found that the tea company copied the luxury brand's famous flower design.

slides.headline: South Korea pushes for chip projects
slides.explanation: South Korea's leader is calling for faster progress on major semiconductor projects. This move aims to keep the country competitive in the global chip market.

slides.headline: US stocks set for a strong start
slides.explanation: Wall Street looks ready to keep its winning streak going after the holiday weekend. Stock futures were up on Sunday as investors remain optimistic.

slides.headline: OPEC+ increases oil production
slides.explanation: Major oil producers agreed to boost their output slightly. The increase is mostly symbolic for now while global shipping routes face ongoing uncertainty.

slides.headline: Asian markets dip before earnings
slides.explanation: Shares in Asia started the week lower as investors prepare for upcoming company earnings reports. Oil prices are also feeling the pressure from higher supply levels.

instagram.caption: It is a busy start to the week for global markets. From legal trouble for a bubble tea brand to movement in the oil and chip industries, here is what you need to know. Swipe through for the top finance stories of the day. Read more on HEADLINNE.com.
